expo.name: Home Security Hub
expo.description: Transform your smartphone into an intelligent home security and automation hub with network and Bluetooth device monitoring.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs location access to scan for Bluetooth devices for home security monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs location access to scan for Bluetooth devices for home security monitoring.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app scans for Bluetooth devices to detect who is home for security purposes.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app scans for Bluetooth devices to detect who is home for security purposes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Optional microphone access for sound-based security alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Optional camera access for visual security monitoring.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: This app needs location access to scan for Bluetooth devices for home security monitoring.
